sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41495" key="e)pife/rbomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιφέρβομαι</orth>, <sense id="n41495.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">feed on,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὁπόσοι γῆν -όμεθα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0214.tlg001:2:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phanocl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
